div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: Donor retention declined

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Is the decline driven by
first-time donor attrition?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Is the post-gift acknowledgment
sent within 48 hours?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
FIX ACKNOWLEDGMENT SPEED FIRST
48-hour thank-you is the highest-leverage retention lever

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Does the acknowledgment personalize
the gift amount and stated use?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PERSONALIZE THE ACKNOWLEDGMENT
generic thank-yous have lower renewal rates

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
IMPROVE FIRST-YEAR STEWARDSHIP SEQUENCE
the pipeline of touches after the thank-you is the gap

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Is the decline in multi-year donors?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Have lapsed donors been contacted
within the 18-month window?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
LAUNCH WIN-BACK SEQUENCE
reactivate lapsing donors before the window closes

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SEGMENTATION OR CHANNEL ISSUE
audit by tier and channel to find the leak

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
MIXED SIGNAL
retention analyst review - run cohort analysis by tier and year
